aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite GLS Appliance & HVAC Repair due to a lack of structured content and conversational authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC and appliance repair questions.
Optimize existing content for conversational queries by incorporating natural language phrases.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No engagement with customer Q&A on the profile.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common repair processes
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service information

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and appliance repair tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as the expert by creating detailed how-to guides and publishing them with HowTo schema.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ schema and conversational content, making it less likely for AI models to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; waiting means losing ground in the AI-driven landscape.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Optimize Your Online Presence Now!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your business stand out to AI assistants.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can enhance your AI visibility and capture more leads.
